content.p: This subchapter shall only apply to a mutual insurance company in a State which has not enacted a law which expressly establishes reasonable terms and conditions for a mutual insurance company domiciled in such State to reorganize into a mutual holding company.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Pub. L. 106–102, title III, § 316, Nov. 12, 1999, 113 Stat. 1422, provided that: “This subtitle [subtitle B (§§ 311–316) of title III of Pub. L. 106–102, enacting this subchapter] shall take effect on the date of the enactment of this Act [Nov. 12, 1999].”
